# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

elasticsearch:
  path.repo: /data/snapshots
  cluster.name: my-awesome-cluster
  node.name: es-node-1

snapshotting:
  snapshot:
    frequency: 6h
    repository: s3
    type: fs
    options:
      bucket: my-aws-bucket
      region: us-west-2
      timeout: 30m
      compress: true
      concurrent_snapshots: 5

restore:
  enabled: false
  repository: s3
  type: fs
  options:
    bucket: my-aws-backup-bucket
